2360530.name: Snowball Fight 2025
2360530.description:
This is fun relaxing snowball fight game just in time for Holidays 2025

If you like the Holidays, specifically snow and having snowball fights this game is for you. 

1. Start off one one team fighting against another with snowballs

2. Press the mouse to wind up and then throw the snowball before the opponent throws one at you.

3. Once all the other team is knocked out, you win

4. This is a top down relaxing game

In this game you start on one team during a snow storm. You can pick up snowballs and throw it at the opponents. Watch as each gets more challenging and the opponents throw snowballs faster. If you survive you win the snowball fight

Our team has several small time developers, many who have disabilities and who are giving it their best. We are unable to always product AAA standard games. But any support will be used to make the game better and improve it over time. We have put many hours into this game and it was hard work to develop this. We absolutely will be improving it more and more.
2360530.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
